notes: Shoulder pain flags per Austin's pain map (0 = none, higher = more provocative for his right shoulder). YouTube links are search URLs pointed at reputable coaching channels so they never break; Austin can swap in specific videos anytime. demo_svg lives in the companion file exercise_demos.json keyed by id (authored in Sprint 4).

exercises.name: Barbell Bench Press
exercises.setup: Lie flat, eyes under the bar, feet planted, slight arch, shoulder blades pinched down and back.
exercises.cue: Lower to the lower chest with elbows ~45 degrees, then press up and slightly back over the shoulders.
exercises.mistake: Flaring elbows straight out to 90 degrees, which stresses the shoulder joint.

exercises.name: Incline Dumbbell Press
exercises.setup: Bench at 30 degrees, dumbbells at chest, wrists stacked over elbows.
exercises.cue: Press up and slightly together, keeping shoulder blades pinned to the bench.
exercises.mistake: Setting the bench too steep so it becomes a shoulder press.

exercises.name: Flat Dumbbell Press
exercises.setup: Lie flat, dumbbells over lower chest, shoulder blades retracted.
exercises.cue: Lower under control to chest level, press up without letting the dumbbells drift toward the face.
exercises.mistake: Bouncing the bottom or letting elbows sag below the bench line.

exercises.name: Push-Up
exercises.setup: Hands just outside shoulders, body in a straight line from head to heels, core braced.
exercises.cue: Lower with elbows ~45 degrees, chest to floor, press back up in one line.
exercises.mistake: Hips sagging or head dropping ahead of the hands.

exercises.name: Cable Chest Fly
exercises.setup: Cables at chest height, soft bend in the elbows, one foot staggered forward.
exercises.cue: Sweep hands together in a wide arc, squeeze the chest, control the return.
exercises.mistake: Turning it into a press by bending the elbows through the rep.

exercises.name: Machine Chest Press
exercises.setup: Seat height so handles line up with mid-chest, back flat against the pad.
exercises.cue: Press smoothly to near lockout, control back until you feel a stretch.
exercises.mistake: Seat set too low, forcing an overhead-press angle on the shoulders.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Shoulder Press
exercises.setup: Seated with back support, dumbbells at ear height, elbows slightly forward of the body.
exercises.cue: Press up and slightly in; stop short of pain range on the right side.
exercises.mistake: Pressing with elbows flared wide behind the body (worst angle for the shoulder).

exercises.name: Barbell Overhead Press
exercises.setup: Bar at collarbone, grip just outside shoulders, ribs down, glutes and core tight.
exercises.cue: Press straight up, move the head back then through as the bar passes the face.
exercises.mistake: Leaning back into the lower spine instead of bracing the core.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Lateral Raise
exercises.setup: Light dumbbells, soft elbows, slight forward lean from the hips.
exercises.cue: Lead with the elbows, raise to shoulder height, pour-the-water pinky slightly high.
exercises.mistake: Going too heavy and shrugging the traps up into the neck.

exercises.name: Rear Delt Fly
exercises.setup: Hinge at the hips (or use the pec-deck reverse), light weight, soft elbows.
exercises.cue: Squeeze the shoulder blades and sweep the arms back and out.
exercises.mistake: Using momentum and yanking with the lower back.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Front Raise
exercises.setup: Dumbbells in front of thighs, soft elbows, ribs down.
exercises.cue: Raise to shoulder height under control, lower slowly.
exercises.mistake: Swinging the weight up with body english.

exercises.name: Band Pull-Apart
exercises.setup: Arms straight at chest height, band held shoulder-width, ribs down.
exercises.cue: Pull the band apart by squeezing the shoulder blades together, control the return.
exercises.mistake: Shrugging or bending the elbows to move more band.

exercises.name: Band External Rotation
exercises.setup: Elbow pinned to the side at 90 degrees, band anchored at waist height across the body.
exercises.cue: Rotate the forearm outward keeping the elbow glued to the ribs.
exercises.mistake: Letting the elbow drift off the body and using the shoulder to cheat.

exercises.name: Wall Slide
exercises.setup: Back and arms against the wall, forearms up in a goalpost, lower back flat.
exercises.cue: Slide the arms up and down keeping wrists and elbows on the wall.
exercises.mistake: Arching the lower back off the wall to reach higher.

exercises.name: Prone Y-T-W Raise
exercises.setup: Face down on an incline bench or floor, light or no weight.
exercises.cue: Form the letters Y, then T, then W by squeezing the shoulder blades each time.
exercises.mistake: Using heavy weight and shrugging instead of driving from the mid-back.

exercises.name: Scapular Push-Up
exercises.setup: Top of a push-up or on knees, arms locked straight.
exercises.cue: Without bending the elbows, pinch the shoulder blades together then push the upper back to the ceiling.
exercises.mistake: Bending the elbows and turning it into a tiny push-up.

exercises.name: Cable Face Pull
exercises.setup: Rope at face height, step back to tension, thumbs pointing back.
exercises.cue: Pull the rope to the forehead, driving the elbows high and squeezing the rear delts.
exercises.mistake: Dropping the elbows and turning it into a row.

exercises.name: Barbell Back Squat
exercises.setup: Bar on upper traps, feet shoulder-width, toes slightly out, big brace.
exercises.cue: Sit down between the hips, knees tracking over toes, drive up through mid-foot.
exercises.mistake: Knees caving in or heels lifting off the floor.

exercises.name: Barbell Front Squat
exercises.setup: Bar on front delts, elbows high, loose fingertip grip, upright torso.
exercises.cue: Keep the elbows up and chest tall, squat straight down between the hips.
exercises.mistake: Letting the elbows drop, which dumps the bar forward.

exercises.name: Goblet Squat
exercises.setup: Hold one dumbbell vertically at the chest, feet shoulder-width.
exercises.cue: Squat down between the knees keeping the chest tall and elbows inside the knees.
exercises.mistake: Rounding forward as depth increases.

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
exercises.setup: Bar at the hips, soft knees, shoulders back, neutral spine.
exercises.cue: Push the hips back, slide the bar down the thighs until you feel the hamstrings, drive hips forward.
exercises.mistake: Rounding the lower back or turning it into a squat.

exercises.name: Conventional Deadlift
exercises.setup: Mid-foot under the bar, shins close, flat back, big brace before the pull.
exercises.cue: Push the floor away and stand tall; bar stays against the legs the whole way.
exercises.mistake: Hips shooting up first, leaving the back to do the work.

exercises.name: Barbell Lunge
exercises.setup: Bar on upper traps, feet hip-width, brace the core.
exercises.cue: Step forward, drop the back knee toward the floor, drive through the front heel.
exercises.mistake: Front knee collapsing inward or torso pitching forward.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Step-Up
exercises.setup: Dumbbells at the sides, box at about knee height.
exercises.cue: Drive through the whole front foot to stand tall on the box, control the way down.
exercises.mistake: Pushing off the back foot instead of driving with the top leg.

exercises.name: Leg Press
exercises.setup: Feet shoulder-width mid-platform, lower back flat against the pad.
exercises.cue: Lower until knees reach about 90 degrees, press through mid-foot without locking hard.
exercises.mistake: Letting the lower back round off the pad at the bottom.

exercises.name: Seated/Lying Leg Curl
exercises.setup: Pad just above the heels, knees lined up with the machine pivot.
exercises.cue: Curl the heels toward the glutes and squeeze, control the return.
exercises.mistake: Bouncing the weight or lifting the hips off the pad.

exercises.name: Leg Extension
exercises.setup: Pad on the lower shins, knees at the pivot, back against the seat.
exercises.cue: Extend to straight, pause and squeeze the quads, lower slowly.
exercises.mistake: Slamming into lockout with momentum.

exercises.name: Standing Calf Raise
exercises.setup: Balls of the feet on the platform, heels free to drop.
exercises.cue: Rise onto the toes as high as possible, pause, lower under control for a full stretch.
exercises.mistake: Bouncing through a tiny range of motion.

exercises.name: Pull-Up
exercises.setup: Grip just outside shoulders, hang with shoulder blades set down.
exercises.cue: Lead with the chest, pull the elbows down to the ribs, chin over the bar.
exercises.mistake: Kipping or shrugging into the neck instead of pulling from the back.

exercises.name: Lat Pulldown
exercises.setup: Grip wider than shoulders, thighs under the pads, slight lean back.
exercises.cue: Pull the bar to the upper chest by driving the elbows down and squeezing the lats.
exercises.mistake: Yanking the bar behind the neck or leaning way back.

exercises.name: Seated Cable Row
exercises.setup: Feet on the plate, soft knees, tall chest, slight forward reach.
exercises.cue: Pull to the belly button, squeeze the shoulder blades, control the return.
exercises.mistake: Heaving with the lower back instead of rowing with the arms and back.

exercises.name: One-Arm Dumbbell Row
exercises.setup: One hand and knee on the bench, flat back, dumbbell hanging.
exercises.cue: Row the dumbbell to the hip, leading with the elbow, squeeze the lat.
exercises.mistake: Rotating the torso to throw the weight up.

exercises.name: Barbell Bent-Over Row
exercises.setup: Hinge to about 45 degrees, flat back, bar hanging at the shins.
exercises.cue: Row the bar to the lower ribs, elbows back, then lower under control.
exercises.mistake: Standing up through the rep and losing the hinge.

exercises.name: Back Extension
exercises.setup: Hips on the pad, feet anchored, arms across the chest.
exercises.cue: Hinge down then squeeze the glutes to rise to a straight line, no further.
exercises.mistake: Hyperextending and cranking the lower back at the top.

exercises.name: Front Plank
exercises.setup: Forearms under shoulders, body in a straight line, toes tucked.
exercises.cue: Brace the abs and squeeze the glutes, breathe normally.
exercises.mistake: Hips sagging or piking up toward the ceiling.

exercises.name: Side Plank
exercises.setup: Forearm under the shoulder, body stacked in a straight line on the side.
exercises.cue: Drive the hips up and hold a straight line from head to feet.
exercises.mistake: Hips sinking toward the floor.

exercises.name: Dead Bug
exercises.setup: On the back, arms up, knees bent to 90 degrees over the hips, lower back flat.
exercises.cue: Lower the opposite arm and leg slowly while keeping the lower back pinned.
exercises.mistake: Letting the lower back arch up as the limbs extend.

exercises.name: Hanging Knee Raise
exercises.setup: Hang with shoulder blades set, legs together.
exercises.cue: Curl the knees up toward the chest using the abs, control the way down.
exercises.mistake: Swinging and using momentum instead of the abs.

exercises.name: Cable Crunch
exercises.setup: Kneel below a high rope, rope at the sides of the head, hips back.
exercises.cue: Crunch the ribs toward the pelvis, rounding the spine, hips stay put.
exercises.mistake: Pulling with the arms or hinging at the hips instead of crunching.

exercises.name: Pallof Press
exercises.setup: Stand side-on to the cable at chest height, hands at the sternum.
exercises.cue: Press the handle straight out and resist the pull to rotate, then return.
exercises.mistake: Letting the torso twist toward the machine.

exercises.name: Bird Dog
exercises.setup: Hands under shoulders, knees under hips, flat back.
exercises.cue: Extend the opposite arm and leg to a straight line, keep the hips level.
exercises.mistake: Rotating the hips or arching the lower back.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Swing
exercises.setup: One dumbbell held with both hands, feet slightly wider than shoulders.
exercises.cue: Hinge and hike the weight back, then snap the hips forward to float it to chest height.
exercises.mistake: Squatting and lifting with the arms instead of a hip hinge snap.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Swing
exercises.setup: Kettlebell a foot in front, hinge and grip it, flat back.
exercises.cue: Hike it back between the legs, then drive the hips forward hard to float it up.
exercises.mistake: Lifting with the shoulders instead of snapping the hips.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Jump Shrug
exercises.setup: Dumbbells at the sides, athletic stance, slight knee bend.
exercises.cue: Dip and explosively extend hips, ankles and traps as if jumping, dumbbells stay in the hands.
exercises.mistake: Pulling with the arms instead of driving from the hips and traps.

exercises.name: Medicine Ball Slam
exercises.setup: Ball overhead, feet shoulder-width, ribs down.
exercises.cue: Reach tall then slam the ball down hard using the whole body, follow through with the hips.
exercises.mistake: Slamming with the arms only and staying upright.

exercises.name: Box Jump
exercises.setup: Box at a safe height, athletic stance a step back.
exercises.cue: Load the hips, swing the arms and jump, land soft in a quarter-squat, step down.
exercises.mistake: Jumping down off the box, which pounds the knees.

exercises.name: Light Hang Clean (warmup/conditioning only)
exercises.setup: LIGHT bar only. Bar at the hips, hinge to just above the knee.
exercises.cue: Snap the hips and shrug, catch the bar softly on the front delts. Never heavy (radius history).
exercises.mistake: Loading heavy or muscling it up with the arms. Keep it light and crisp.

exercises.name: Rowing Erg
exercises.setup: Straps snug, shins vertical at the catch, arms straight.
exercises.cue: Drive legs, then swing back, then pull arms; reverse the order to return.
exercises.mistake: Yanking with the arms early instead of leading with the legs.

exercises.name: Air/Spin Bike
exercises.setup: Seat height so the knee has a slight bend at the bottom.
exercises.cue: Steady strong cadence; push and pull the handles if it is an air bike.
exercises.mistake: Bouncing in the seat at too-high a cadence with no resistance.

exercises.name: Incline Treadmill Walk
exercises.setup: Set a brisk speed and a 6 to 12 percent incline.
exercises.cue: Stand tall, drive the arms, avoid holding the rails.
exercises.mistake: Leaning on the handrails, which removes the work.

exercises.name: Jump Rope
exercises.setup: Rope length so the handles reach the armpits when standing on the middle.
exercises.cue: Small wrist turns, light bounces on the balls of the feet.
exercises.mistake: Big arm circles and jumping too high.

exercises.name: Half-Kneeling Hip Flexor Stretch
exercises.setup: Half-kneeling, back toe down, tall torso.
exercises.cue: Tuck the pelvis under and shift slightly forward until you feel the front of the back hip.
exercises.mistake: Arching the lower back instead of tucking the pelvis.

exercises.name: Standing Hamstring Stretch
exercises.setup: One heel on a low bench, leg straight, hips square.
exercises.cue: Hinge at the hips with a flat back until you feel the hamstring.
exercises.mistake: Rounding the back to reach the toes.

exercises.name: Doorway Chest/Shoulder Stretch
exercises.setup: Forearm on the frame, elbow at shoulder height.
exercises.cue: Step gently forward until you feel a mild stretch across the chest and front of the shoulder.
exercises.mistake: Pushing into pain, especially on the right shoulder.

exercises.name: Open-Book Thoracic Rotation
exercises.setup: Side-lying, knees stacked and bent, arms together out front.
exercises.cue: Open the top arm across to the other side, following it with the eyes, keep the knees down.
exercises.mistake: Letting the knees roll open instead of rotating the mid-back.

exercises.name: Pigeon Stretch
exercises.setup: Front shin across, back leg extended straight behind.
exercises.cue: Keep the hips square and fold forward until you feel the glute of the front leg.
exercises.mistake: Collapsing to one side and losing square hips.

exercises.name: Child's Pose
exercises.setup: Kneel and sit the hips back toward the heels, arms reaching forward.
exercises.cue: Breathe and let the chest sink toward the floor for a lat and lower-back stretch.
exercises.mistake: Holding tension instead of relaxing into it.

exercises.name: Cat-Cow
exercises.setup: Hands under shoulders, knees under hips.
exercises.cue: Alternate arching (cow) and rounding (cat) the spine with the breath.
exercises.mistake: Rushing and only moving the lower back.

exercises.name: Standing Quad Stretch
exercises.setup: Stand tall, grab one ankle behind you, knees together.
exercises.cue: Tuck the pelvis and pull the heel toward the glute until you feel the quad.
exercises.mistake: Letting the knee drift out and the back arch.

exercises.name: World's Greatest Stretch
exercises.setup: Deep lunge, back leg straight, front foot flat.
exercises.cue: Drop the same-side elbow toward the instep, then rotate the arm up to the ceiling.
exercises.mistake: Rushing through instead of moving slowly through each position.

exercises.name: Arm Circles
exercises.setup: Arms out to the sides at shoulder height.
exercises.cue: Small controlled circles forward then back, staying below any pinch point.
exercises.mistake: Big fast circles that provoke the shoulder.
